# SpaceX Stock Forecast: After a 19% IPO Surge, Can SPCX Keep Climbing Before Earnings?

OverviewKey Points

As of June 15, SpaceX (SPCX) trades at $171.91, following a strong IPO debut and a 19.2% gain on its first day. Technical indicators suggest further upside, with a target of $183.96, supported by MSCI inclusion and limited float. Key developments include an 18,712 Bitcoin treasury and a tokenized SPCX on Solana. The September 2, 2026 earnings report will be a crucial fundamental anchor for future valuation. A break above $176.50 could drive the stock to $183.96-$185.

![](https://resource.tradingkey.com/uploads/20260325/shutterstock_2523320519-d0bff39d27154b2a8cfac04055bfe6fb.jpg)
